title: Cubscribers' SMP Tool Box
description: A simple modpack for members to be able to use the extended features of The Cubscribers' SMP
body:
A simple bundle of mods for easy access to the extended features supported by cubfan135's supporter server - The Cubscribers' SMP. 


Features include:

 

- In game voice chat - Communicate directly in game without the need for Discord or other third party commuications platforms. Enjoy the startling sensation when a voice pops out of nowhere in open proximity chat, open a group for a project or just because, or get a group of friends together in a private password protected group for all thoes shady shinaigans.
- Advanced armor stand editing - Bring your armor stands to the next level with Armor Poser, a comprehensive editor for armor stands with features outside regular edits.
- What you up to? - Using Status, tell people weather your free, busy, recording, streaming, or even if you don't want people to sleep.
- Appleskin - Show's your current saturation and hunger, how much foodstuffs will replenish and more.
 

Enjoy :)
